case_title: JOSEPH SOLDIS VS. UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-12-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH SOLDIS IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCES. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JILL MOFFATT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF'S ORAL 170.6 CCP CHALLENGE GRANTED. COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT ZOOM ON NEXT APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**DENIED** UNTIMELY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2022 - CONTINUED PLAINTIFF WILL NOT ALLOWED CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM TO NOV-03-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH SOLDIS IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY JILL MOFFETT, CUSTOMER SERVICE MANAGER. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH SOLDIS STATED TO COURTROOM CLERK THAT HIS APPEARANCE BY ZOOM HAS BEEN AUTHORIZED AND HAVE SUBMITTED A REQUEST TO APPEAR HEARING BY ZOOM FOR TODAY'S HEARING. COURTROOM CLERK INFORMS PLAINTIFF HIS ZOOM REQUEST FILED ON OCT-7-2022 WAS DENIED, DUE TO UNTIMELY. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH SOLDIS ORALLY STATED WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM FOR HEARING THIS CASE. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A TIMELY REQUEST TO APPEAR HEARING BY ZOOM FOR THE NEXT HEARING, OR CASE WILL PROCEED WITHOUT PLAINTIFF IF PLAINTIFF MAKES AN UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE ON THE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANT ZOOM ON NEXT APPEARANCE IS GRANTED BY COURT. CONTINUED DATE AS AGREED BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $25) SERVED JUN-15-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-24-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH SOLDIS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC REPRESENTED BY JILL MOFFATT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW TIMELY FILING FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)

calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-03-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: All parties are sworn.

Appearances:
Joseph Soldis Plaintiff in pro per.
Jill Moffatt is authorized to appear for United Airlines, Inc.

Mr. Soldis testifies on his own behalf
Ms. Moffatt testifies on behalf of United Airlines, Inc.

With respect to Defendants video appearance, the Court states that the matter has been previously decided by another judge. Had the matter been brought to this Court, the ruling would have been the same.

Mr. Soldis explains his claims.
Ms. Moffatt responds to these claims.
Mr. Soldis cross examines Ms. Moffatt.

The Court finds that claims under the California Invasion of Privacy Law are preemptive under federal law. The Court has reviewed other authorities on the matter and rules that there is no basis for these claims.

The Court dismisses the claims filed by Mr. Soldis.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-03-2022 Continued To Nov-03-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 504
